tasks.title: [SPEC-058-01] Setup 9 Qdrant collections

tasks.title: [SPEC-058-02] Criar apps/hermes-agency skeleton

subtasks.title: package.json com langgraph, qdrant-client, telegram dependencies
Diretórios src/skills/ src/langgraph/ src/router/ src/qdrant/ src/telegram/ src/litellm/

tasks.title: [SPEC-058-02] Registrar 11 Hermes skills
tasks.description: Registrar as 11 skills de agente em Hermes: agency-ceo, agency-onboarding, agency-video-editor, agency-organizer, agency-creative, agency-design, agency-social, agency-pm, agency-analytics, agency-brand-guardian, agency-client-success

tasks.title: [SPEC-058-03] LangGraph content_pipeline
tasks.description: Implementar WF-1: Content Pipeline — Client sends brief → CEO → CREATIVE → EDITOR → DESIGN → BRAND GUARDIAN → human gate → SOCIAL → ANALYTICS

tasks.title: [SPEC-058-03] LangGraph onboarding_flow
tasks.description: Implementar WF-2: Onboarding Automation — New client → ONBOARDING → Qdrant init → HELPER welcome → PM milestone → CS check-in

tasks.title: [SPEC-058-03] LangGraph status_update
tasks.description: Implementar WF-3: Status Update (recurring Monday 9am) — PM → ANALYTICS → CEO formats → Telegram broadcast

tasks.title: [SPEC-058-03] LangGraph social_calendar
tasks.description: Implementar WF-4: Social Calendar + Analytics — SOCIAL scrapes → ANALYTICS metrics → BRAND GUARDIAN review → Telegram channel report

tasks.title: [SPEC-058-03] LangGraph lead_qualification
tasks.description: Implementar WF-5: Lead Qualification — New prospect → CS scores → if qualified: ONBOARDING task → else: nurture sequence

tasks.title: [SPEC-058-04] LiteLLM fallback chain config
tasks.description: Configurar litellm_router com fallback chain: gemma4-12b-it (Ollama) → gemini-2.0-flash (cloud) → minimax-m2.7 (emergency, commented)

tasks.title: [SPEC-058-04] Redis semantic cache
tasks.description: Implementar semantic cache layer no ai-gateway com Redis — 35-50% hit rate esperado, reduz cloud LLM cost de $8-10 para ~$4-5/mo

tasks.title: [SPEC-058-05] Telegram bot skeleton
tasks.description: Criar Telegram bot base em apps/hermes-agency/src/telegram/bot.ts — polling mode, per-chat locks, health check

tasks.title: [SPEC-058-05] Telegram handlers — 11 skills
tasks.description: Implementar handlers para as 11 skills — cada handler recebe message, routing para skill correta, retorna response formatado

tasks.title: [SPEC-058-05] Human gate Telegram integration
tasks.description: Integrar human gates no Telegram — quando confidence < 0.7, pausa e pede confirmacao humana via Telegram poll

tasks.title: [SPEC-058-06] bge-m3 embedding integration
tasks.description: Integrar bge-m3 embeddings para PT-BR hybrid search (sparse+dense via BM25) — 1024 dimensions

tasks.title: [SPEC-058-06] Hybrid search for all 9 collections
tasks.description: Implementar hybrid search (BM25 + dense vector) em todas as 9 coleções — PT-BR content optimization

tasks.title: [SPEC-058-07] RBAC para agency skills
tasks.description: Implementar RBAC layer — cada skill tem permission scope, MCP permission gate verifica acesso

tasks.title: [SPEC-058-07] Audit logging
tasks.description: Implementar audit log — todas as chamadas de skills gravadas em agency_conversations com metadata

tasks.title: [SPEC-058-08] smoke-agency-suite.sh 11/11
tasks.description: Criar smoke-tests/smoke-agency-suite.sh — testa: Hermes skills (11), Qdrant collections (9), LiteLLM chain (3 tiers), Telegram bot, human gates

tasks.title: [SPEC-058-08] Prometheus metrics
tasks.description: Expor métricas Prometheus: cache hit rate, LLM latency, task completion rate, human gate triggers

tasks.title: [SPEC-059-01] Redis client singleton + graceful fallback
tasks.description: Criar apps/hermes-agency/src/telegram/redis.ts — ioredis client com connection retry, health check, e fallback para em memória quando Redis unavailable. Todas as operações devem logar warning e continuar em modo degradado.

tasks.title: [SPEC-059-01] Redis-backed distributed lock (SETNX + TTL)
tasks.description: Criar apps/hermes-agency/src/telegram/distributed_lock.ts — lock atómico por chatId usando Redis SETNX com TTL 30s (configurável via HERMES_LOCK_TTL_SEC). Fallback para Map em memória com warning quando Redis down.

tasks.title: [SPEC-059-01] Redis-backed rate limiter (sliding window)
tasks.description: Criar apps/hermes-agency/src/telegram/rate_limiter.ts — rate limit 5 msgs/10s por userId usando Redis INCR + EXPIRE. Fallback para Map em memória quando Redis unavailable. Configurável via HERMES_RATE_WINDOW_MS e HERMES_RATE_MAX_MSGS.

tasks.title: [SPEC-059-02] File validator — size + MIME magic bytes
tasks.description: Criar apps/hermes-agency/src/telegram/file_validator.ts — validar ficheiros com file-type (magic bytes) e rejeitar .exe renomeado a .jpg. MAX_FILE_SIZE=20MB configurável via HERMES_MAX_FILE_SIZE.

tasks.title: [SPEC-059-03] Per-user semaphore (concurrency limit)
tasks.description: Implementar semaphore por userId — máximo 3 uploads concurrentes por utilizador (HERMES_MAX_CONCURRENT). Previne flood attacks. Usar Map<userId, number> com decrement em finally.

tasks.title: [SPEC-059-03] Periodic memory cleanup (Map leak prevention)
tasks.description: Adicionar setInterval cleanup aos Maps de rate limiter e locks — remover entradas expiradas a cada RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS*2. Evitar memory growth infinito em produção long-running.

tasks.title: [SPEC-059-04] Admin-only /health (hide internal ports)
tasks.description: Modificar bot.command('health') — verificar ctx.from.id contra HERMES_ADMIN_USER_IDS (CSV env var). Utilizadores normais veem só status básico (Hermes ok/not-ok). Admins veem portas internas (STT :8204, TTS :8013, Ollama :11434).

tasks.title: [SPEC-059-05] New env vars — REDIS_URL, HERMES_ADMIN_USER_IDS, HERMES_MAX_FILE_SIZE, HERMES_MAX_CONCURRENT, HERMES_LOCK_TTL_SEC, HERMES_RATE_WINDOW_MS, HERMES_RATE_MAX_MSGS
tasks.description: Adicionar novas variáveis de ambiente ao .env e .env.example: REDIS_URL, HERMES_ADMIN_USER_IDS, HERMES_MAX_FILE_SIZE (20MB), HERMES_MAX_CONCURRENT (3), HERMES_LOCK_TTL_SEC (30), HERMES_RATE_WINDOW_MS (10000), HERMES_RATE_MAX_MSGS (5).

tasks.title: [SPEC-059-06] Smoke test — hardening validation
tasks.description: Criar smoke-tests/smoke-agency-hardening.sh — validar: (1) ficheiro >20MB rejeitado, (2) ficheiro MIME inválido rejeitado, (3) 6 msgs rápidas — 5 permitidas, 1 bloqueada, (4) admin vs user health outputs different.
